sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.1g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, this mostly lives or dies on carb behaviour.
sections.subtitleText: 0.1g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a tuber, this mostly lives or dies on carb behaviour.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 20.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.
sections.subtitleText: 20.1g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 1.6g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.
sections.subtitleText: 1.6g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 22% daily value, vitamin a at 18% daily value stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 22% daily value, vitamin a at 18% daily value stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: practical staple carb source because tubers are often judged by how usable they are day to day. whole-food carb package because that matters because it is a cleaner baseline than heavily refined carbs. can be quite filling because a useful practical strength when the preparation stays sensible.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: still a carb-heavy category because that is the core ceiling tubers have to manage. preparation changes outcomes a lot because what you do to a tuber can make or break it. protein support is weak because tubers still need help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Purple Sweet Potato has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
